title: sida angulata
intro: Sida angulata, also known as the winged sida or winged jute, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It is native to Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Sida angulata is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to treat various health conditions, with the root and leaves being the most commonly used parts of the plant.
